channel.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 21st, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Ganimedestars2 - Store, version, edit and execute notebooks in sandboxes and integrate them directly via REST interfaces.
  • Voilastars3.3k - Rendering of live Jupyter Notebooks with interactive widgets, allowing dashboarding based on Jupyter Notebooks.

    • Visualization

  • ipychartstars25 - Interactive Chart.js plots in Jupyter.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 15th, 2021
item.description:
Visualization

  • Evidentlystars675 - Interactive reports to analyze machine learning models during validation or production monitoring.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter May 17th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Jupyter Bookstars2.2k - Build publication-quality books and documents from computational material.

    • Domain-Specific Projects

  • keplergl - Jupyter extension for visual exploration of large-scale geolocation data sets.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 29th, 2021
item.description:
Visualization

  • luxstars2.2k - Recommends a set of visualizations whenever a dataframe is printed in a notebook.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 29th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • jutstars98 - CLI to nicely display notebooks in the terminal.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 25th, 2021
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab-executorstars5 - Extension to execute scripts from the Jupyterlab file browser.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 24th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • ContainDS Dashboardsstars102 - JupyterHub extension to host authenticated scripts or notebooks in any framework (Voilà, Streamlit, Plotly Dash etc).

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 25th, 2021
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • Guild AI - Execute notebooks as experiments to capture and compare results over time.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • nbgitpullerstars128 - Sync a git repository one-way to a local path.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 6th, 2021
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • elyrastars924 - A visual editor for creating and running notebook (or Python script) pipelines locally or remotely.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Dec 5th, 2020
item.description:
Visualization

  • mpld3 - Combining Matplotlib and D3js for interactive data visualizations.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 28th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Jupytextstars4.5k - Convert and synchronize notebooks with text formats (e.g. Python or Markdown files) that work well under version control.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 19th, 2020
item.description:
Domain-Specific Projects

  • Jupyletstars127 - Create 2D and 3D games, graphics, live music and sound interactively in a Jupyter notebook.

item.description:

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • jupyter-nbrequirementsstars9 - Dependency management and optimization in Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 5th, 2020
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Google Colaboratory - Cloud-based Jupyter environment aimed at machine learning education and research.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Oct 29th, 2020
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Naas - JupyterLab environment with magic scheduling/notification functionaltiy and assets/dependency/secrets management.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Oct 27th, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • nbQAstars215 - Run any standard Python code quality tool on a Jupyter Notebook, from the command-line or via pre-commit.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 31st, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • nbflowstars152 - One-button reproducible workflows with Jupyter and Scons.
  • nbinteract - Create interactive webpages from Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 28th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • nbdevstars2.8k - Develop, package and distribute Python packages to PyPI using Jupyter as a Literate Programing environment.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 10th, 2020
item.description:
Testing

  • treebeardstars152 - GitHub Action for testing/scheduling Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jul 13th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Ploomberstars279 - Run a collection of notebooks and scripts in a reproducible manner using a pipeline.yaml file.

item.description:

item.description:

  • Visual Studio Code - Native desktop notebook frontend.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 16th, 2020

  • pd-replicatorstars6 - Copy a pandas DataFrame to the clipboard with one click.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 8th, 2020

  • Kapitsastars6 - CLI to search local Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 6th, 2020
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • voilastars3.3k - Notebooks as interactive standalone web applications.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • debuggerstars496 - A visual debugger for Jupyter notebooks, consoles, and source files.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 24th, 2020
item.description:
Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • How to Grow Neat Software Architecture out of Jupyter Notebooksstars505 - Article and video about growing a neat software architecture from notebooks.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Google Cloud AI Platform Notebooks - Managed JupyterLab notebook instances configured with GPU-enabled machine learning frameworks on Google Cloud Platform.
  • Google Cloud Dataproc Jupyter component - Jupyter and JupyterLab for Apache Spark using Google Cloud Dataproc.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 26th, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • gitstars862 - Extension for git integration.
  • nbdimestars2k - Tools for diffing and merging of Jupyter notebooks.
  • ReviewNB - Code reviews for Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 22nd, 2020
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • shortcutuistars53 - An extension for managing keyboard shortcuts.

    • Testing

  • treonstars262 - Easy-to-use test framework for Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 22nd, 2020
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • lspstars875 - IDE-like features (code navigation, hover suggestions, linters, diagnostics, kernel-less autocompletion etc.)

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Oct 10th, 2019
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • code_formatterstars434 - A universal code formatter.
  • python-bytecodestars57 - Explore CPython Bytecode in JupyterLab.
  • quickopenstars65 - Quickly open a file in JupyterLab by typing part of its name.
  • sidecarstars175 - A sidecar output widget for JupyterLab.
  • sqlstars338 - SQL GUI for JupyterLab.
  • system-monitorstars173 - Extension to display system metrics.
  • templatesstars12 - Support for Jupyter Notebook templates.
  • theme-darculastars92 - A handsome Darcula theme for Jupyterlab.
  • topbarstars89 - Top Bar extension for JupyterLab.
  • vimstars857 - Vim notebook cell bindings.
  • nb_blackstars238 - Extension to keep Python code automatically formatted using blackstars20.9k.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 28th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • Beaker - Development environment with seamless data transmission from one language to another.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 5th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • ML Workspacestars1.9k - Docker image that includes Jupyter(Lab) and various packages for data science/machine learning.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Spell.run - End-to-end platform for machine learning and deep learning.
  • Deepnote - Jupyter-compatible data science notebook with real-time collaboration, versioning and easy deployment.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • jp_doodlestars33 - Infrastructure for building special purpose interactive diagrams in 2D and 3D.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter May 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • tqdmstars18.3k - Fast, extensible progress bar for loops and iterables.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 16th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • tributarystars243 - Python data streams with Jupyter support.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab_emailstars47 - Email notebooks and their content from within JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 11th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • ipysheetstars414 - Interactive spreadsheets in Jupyter.
  • ipytreestars74 - Tree UI element for Jupyter.
  • ipywebrtcstars180 - Video/Audio streaming in Jupyter.
  • xleafletstars61 - C++ Backend for ipyleaflet.
  • xwebrtcstars14 - C++ Backend for ipywebrtc.
  • xwidgetsstars109 - C++ Backend for ipywidgets.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 11th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • JupyterWithstars247 - Nix-based framework for the definition of declarative and reproducible Jupyter environments.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 14th, 2019
item.description:
Domain-Specific Projects

  • ArcGIS - Library for working with maps and geospatial data, powered by web GIS.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 19th, 2019
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab-kysostars8 - Extension to publish notebooks to the Kyso platform from Jupyterlab.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Kyso - Data science platform to publish and share Jupyter notebooks as data blogs and web applications.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 16th, 2019
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • IPythonBlocksstars148 - Practice Python with colored grids in Jupyter.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 14th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • ipyleafletstars1.1k - Interactive visualization library for Leaflet.js maps in Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • go-to-definitionstars189 - Extension for navigating to the definition of a variable or function in JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Dec 14th, 2018
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • RMOTR Notebooks - JupyterLab-based data science environment in the cloud.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 8th, 2018
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • ShopRunner/jupyter-notifystars520 - Cell magic for browser notification of cell completion.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 5th, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • ipyvolumestars1.6k - 3D plotting for Python in Jupyter based on widgets and WebGL.
  • itk-jupyter-widgetsstars356 - Interactive widgets to visualize images in 2D and 3D.

    • Testing

  • ipyteststars143 - Test runner for running unit tests from within a notebook.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Community Resources

  • GitHub - Topics: jupyter, jupyter-kernels, jupyter-notebook, jupyterhub, jupyterlab, jupyterlab-extension
  • GitHub - Search: jupyter
  • PyPI - Framework :: Jupyter

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • jupyter-gmapsstars712 - Interactive visualization library for Google Maps in Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 31st, 2018
item.description:
Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • The Littlest JupyterHub - JupyterHub distribution for 1-50 users on a single server; more lightweight than the Zero to JupyterHub setup.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • drawiostars460 - Extension that displays drawio/mxgraph diagrams.
  • latexstars355 - Extension for live editing of LaTeX documents.
  • variableinspectorstars778 - Variable inspector extension that shows variables and their values.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 29th, 2018
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • celltagsstars109 - Extension to organise and execute notebooks using cell tags.
  • google-drivestars341 - Extension for Google Drive integration.
  • tocstars671 - Extension that provides a table of contents for notebooks.
  • voyagerstars250 - Extension to view CSV and JSON data in Voyager.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • pyechartsstars10.9k - Python interface for the EChartsstars46.3k visualization library.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 11th, 2018
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • jupyter-edx-grader-xblockstars40 - Auto-grade a student assignment created as a Jupyter notebook and write the score in the Open edX gradebook.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 10th, 2018
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • rst2ipynbstars12 - Convert standalone reStructuredText files to Jupyter notebook file.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 8th, 2018
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Binder - Turn a GitHub repo into a collection of interactive notebooks.
  • nbconvert - Convert Notebooks to other formats.
  • Nikola - Static Site Generator that converts notebooks into websites.
  • Bookbookstars88 - Bookbook converts a set of notebooks in a directory to HTML or PDF, preserving cross references within and between notebooks.
  • nbscanstars17 - Search for and print cells contents of Jupyter notebooks.
  • notedownstars768 - Convert Jupyter notebooks to markdown (and back).
  • Papermillstars4.1k - Tool for parameterizing, executing, and analyzing Jupyter notebooks.
  • pynbstars229 - Jupyter Notebooks as plain Python code with embedded Markdown text.
  • RISEstars3k - Reveal.js Jupyter/IPython Slideshow.

    • Domain-Specific Projects

  • GenePattern Notebook - Integrating Genomic Analysis with Interactive Notebooks.
  • GeoNotebookstars1k - Extension for exploratory geospatial analysis.
  • lolvizstars719 - Data-structure visualization tool for lists of lists, lists, dictionaries.
  • Quantopian Notebooks - Jupyter-based platform for financial research.
  • vpython-jupyterstars66 - VPython 3D engine running in a Jupyter notebook.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Azure Notebooks - Jupyter notebooks running in the cloud on Microsoft Azure.
  • CoCalc - Notebooks with 17 supported kernel types, course management, LaTeX document authoring, simultaneous document editing and integration with the SageMath computer algebra system.
  • DataScience.com - Platform for enterprise data science.
  • Domino Data Lab - Data science platform with integrated collaboration tools, environment management and compute grid.
  • Gryd - Simple, managed, ready-to-use, cloud based Jupyter notebooks supporting multiple languages.
  • Anaconda Enterprise - Multi-user collaboration and one-click deployment of models, notebooks, and dashboards.
  • PAWS - Jupyter notebook deployment customized for interacting with Wikimedia wikis.

    • Official Resources and Documentation

  • Try Jupyter - Try Jupyter in your browser.
  • JupyterLab Documentation
  • Jupyter kernels - List of all programming languages available as Jupyter kernels.
  • Making kernels for Jupyter

    • Runtimes/Frontends

  • docker-stacksstars5.9k - Hierarchical stacks of ready-to-run Jupyter applications in Docker.
  • Hydrogenstars3.7k - Run code inline in Atom using Jupyter kernels.
  • Jupyter Notebookstars8.2k - Main Jupyter notebook runtime.
  • JupyterHubstars6.2k - Multi-user server for Jupyter.
  • JupyterLabstars11.1k - JupyterLab is the next generation user interface for Jupyter.
  • kaggle/docker-pythonstars1.6k - Kaggle Python docker image that includes datasets and packages.
  • nteractstars5.5k - Native desktop notebook frontend.
  • Stencilastars591 - Native desktop notebook frontend.

    • Collaboration/Education

  • callgraphstars50 - Magic to display a function call graph.
  • jupyter-drivestars408 - Google drive for Jupyter.
  • jupyter-viewer-xblockstars27 - Fetch and display part of, or an entire Jupyter Notebook in an Open edX XBlock.
  • LTI Launch JupyterHub Authenticatorstars44 - Authentication via Edx.
  • nbautoevalstars13 - Create auto-evaluated exercises.
  • nbgraderstars1k - Assigning and grading of Jupyter notebooks.
  • nbtutorstars385 - Visualize Python code execution (line-by-line).

    • Visualization

  • Altairstars6.6k - Declarative visualization library for Python, based on Vega and Vega-Litestars3.3k.
  • Bokeh - Interactive visualization library that targets modern web browsers for presentation.
  • bqplotstars3.1k - Grammar of Graphics-based interactive plotting framework for Jupyter.
  • IPySigmastars15 - Prototype network visualization frontend for Jupyter notebooks.
  • ipywidgetsstars2.2k - UI widgets for Jupyter.
  • pythreejsstars725 - Python / ThreeJS bridge utilizing the Jupyter widget infrastructure.
  • Qgridstars2.7k - Interactive grid for sorting, filtering, and editing DataFrames in Jupyter notebooks.

    • Testing

  • nbvalstars347 - Py.test plugin for validating Jupyter notebooks.
  • sphinxcontrib-jupyterstars67 - Sphinx Extension for Generating Jupyter Notebooks.
  • nosebookstars77 - Nose plugin for finding and running IPython notebooks as nose tests.

    • Community Resources

  • Conference Talks - PyVideo.org, JupyterCon
  • jupyter-map - Map of university institutions that use Jupyter.
  • Gitter - Jupyter Gitter Chatroom
  • Mailing Lists - Jupyter General Mailing List, Jupyter in Education Mailing List

    • Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • Exploratory computing with Python - Collection of notebooks covering scientific computing.
  • Install and run a Jupyter notebook in a Google Cloud Dataproc cluster
  • Interactive Web Plotting with Bokehstars639
  • JupyterLab - Your Personal Data Science Workbench - Talk about JupyterLab at Full Stack Quants London.
  • Jupyter Notebook Extensions
  • Jupyter Notebook Themesstars8.4k
  • Jupyter tips, tricks and shortcuts
  • Lectures on scientific computing with Pythonstars3.1k
  • pytudesstars15.3k - List of Jupyter Notebooks by Peter Norvig.
  • ResGuides: research with Jupyter
  • Zero to JupyterHub - Tutorial to help install and manage JupyterHub.
